speaking.title: Speaking Part 1: Dates and schedules
questions: Do you have any plans this month?
speaking.sampleAnswer: My birthday is on the first of June. Today is the fifth of March. I have a meeting on the tenth of this month.

speaking.title: Speaking Part 2: Review — Describe a helpful person

cueCard.topic: Describe someone who helped you recently.
bullets: what you asked them to do
and explain how you felt about it

speaking.sampleAnswer: I would like to talk about my colleague. I asked, 'Can you help me fill in this form?' First, she checked the date, then she helped me sign at the bottom. The meeting was on the second of May, so I felt relieved she helped me on time.
